query: SELECT lp.id, lp.name, lp.level, c.id as course_id, c.code, c.title, COUNT(l.id) as lesson_count FROM learning_paths lp LEFT JOIN learning_path_courses lpc ON lp.id = lpc.pathId LEFT JOIN courses c ON lpc.courseId = c.id LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId WHERE lp.level IN ('beginner', 'intermediate') GROUP BY lp.id, c.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT lp.id, lp.name, lp.level, c.id as course_id, c.code, c.title, COUNT(l.id) as lesson_count FROM learning_paths lp LEFT JOIN learning_path_courses lpc ON lp.id = lpc.pathId LEFT JOIN courses c ON lpc.courseId = c.id LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId WHERE lp.level IN ('beginner', 'intermediate') GROUP BY lp.id, c.id;
